title: In An Apple Tree.
content:
In September, when the apples were red,
    To Belinda I said,
    "Would you like to go away
    To Heaven, or stay
    Here in this orchard full of trees
    All your life?" And she said, "If you please
    I'll stay here where I know,
    And the flowers grow."
meaning:
"In An Apple Tree." is a quintessential example of Kate Greenaway's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
